title: cliococca selaginoides
intro: Cliococca selaginoides, also known as Wintergreen, is a perennial plant native to North America. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its high concentration of methyl salicylate, which is similar to aspirin. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as pain relief, fever reduction, and inflammation, making it beneficial for conditions like arthritis and muscle soreness. Wintergreen is often used in herbal preparations like teas, tinctures, and salves, and can also be found in some commercial pain-relieving products, although it's essential to use it in moderation and under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
